zh.lifeSummary: 當William Carpenter於1575年12月14日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾沙爾布恩時，他的父親Richard Carpenter40歲，母親Eleanor Elizabeth Reade30歲。他於大約1595年與Alice Swithen在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼阿特萊包洛享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Carpenter于1575年12月14日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾沙爾布恩时，他的父亲Richard Carpenter40岁，母亲Eleanor Elizabeth Reade30岁。他于大约1595年与Alice Swithen在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼阿特萊包洛享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

en.lifeSummary: When William Carpenter was born on 14 December 1575, in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Carpenter, was 40 and his mother, Eleanor Elizabeth Reade, was 30. He married Alice Swithen about 1595, in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1638, in Attleboro, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Carpenter est né le 14 décembre 1575, à Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Carpenter, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Elizabeth Reade, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Swithen environ 1595, à Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1638, à Attleboro, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ko.Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the: 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Carpenter(이)가 1575년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 샤보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Carpenter(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Elizabeth Reade(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1595년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치에서 Alice Swithen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 애틀레버로에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the: салисбури т клос оф т канонс оф т кэтедраль чурч, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Carpenter родился 14 декабря 1575 г. в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Carpenter было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Elizabeth Reade, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Swithen около 1595 г. в местности салисбури т клос оф т канонс оф т кэтедраль чурч, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1638 г. в местности аттлеборо, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the: Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Carpenter nació el 14 de diciembre de 1575, en Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Carpenter, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eleanor Elizabeth Reade, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice Swithen aproximadamente 1595, en Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1638, en Attleboro, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
